message:
feat(tui): Add CRISPR pressure overlay with anti-CRISPR candidate browser

Implement a terminal-based visualization for CRISPR pressure analysis
showing genome-wide immune pressure mapping, anti-CRISPR predictions,
and spacer hit details with interactive candidate browsing.

New component: packages/tui/src/components/CRISPROverlay.tsx (120 lines)

Visual Layout:
╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║ CRISPR PRESSURE & ANTI-CRISPR (C KEY)                      ESC to close ║
║                                                                          ║
║ CRISPR Pressure Map (Genome-wide)                                        ║
║ ░▒▓█████▓▓▒░░░░░▒▒▓▓██░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░    ║
║ Start                                                               End  ║
║                                                                          ║
║ Max Pressure: 8.5 | Spacer Hits: 12 | Acr Candidates: 3                 ║
║                                                                          ║
║ Top Anti-CRISPR Candidates (Use ←/→)                                     ║
║ ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  ║
║ │ ★ Gene: acrF1 (ID: 42)                                             │  ║
║ │ Confidence: HIGH | Score: 75                                        │  ║
║ │ Family: DNA-Mimic                                                   │  ║
║ └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  ║
║                                                                          ║
║ Recent Spacer Hits                                                       ║
║ Pos 1234: E. coli K-12 (II) - PAM: valid                                ║
║ Pos 5678: S. enterica (I) - PAM: invalid                                ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

Key Features:
- Pressure map bar: 60-character visualization using density characters
  (space, ░, ▒, ▓, █) mapped to 0-10 pressure scale
- Summary statistics: Max pressure, total spacer hits, Acr candidate count
- Interactive Acr browser: Left/right arrows navigate between candidates
- Candidate detail panel: Gene name, ID, confidence, score, predicted family
- Spacer hit preview: Shows top 3 hits with position, host, type, PAM status

Component Structure:
- Props: sequence (genome), genes (GeneInfo array)
- useMemo: Runs analyzeCRISPRPressure on mount/sequence change
- useState: Tracks currently selected Acr candidate index
- useInput: Handles Esc/C to close, arrow keys for navigation

Keyboard Controls:
- Esc: Close overlay
- C: Close overlay (alternative)
- ←: Previous Acr candidate
- →: Next Acr candidate

Rendering Logic:
- renderPressureBar(): Maps pressure windows to density characters
- Displays selected Acr in bordered highlight box
- Limits spacer hit list to 3 most recent for space efficiency

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
